name.full: AI Academy · HR Service Delivery Agent

description.short: Tier-0 HR help desk: policy answers, status, letters — before a ticket is raised.
description.full: The AI Academy HR Service Delivery agent answers everyday HR questions in Microsoft 365 Copilot — policy Q&A, request status, knowledge-base search, life-event and leave guidance, letters, data corrections, smart routing, and multilingual support. Every answer runs a governed scenario chain with a human-in-the-loop gate at step 16 and a full audit ledger. Teaching deployment: all HR data is synthetic.
